response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in embedded networking, MACsec, 802.1X, or switch firmware development — all essential for this security-focused embedded role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems including open-source projects
Active contributor to testing frameworks and developer tooling with clear documentation
concerns: No evidence of C programming in UNIX/embedded environments or Linux kernel work
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement
Experience is primarily in web/mobile apps, not embedded networking or switch firmware

key_factors.factor: No exposure to LAN-switch security protocols
